name: @howaboua/pi-claw
description: Redistributable Pi extension package for the Clawa/HOWABANDA runtime.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test config.test.ts template-files.test.ts hydrate.test.ts howabanda/monitor-state.test.ts howabanda/comms/*.test.ts
scripts.ai:check: biome check . && tsgo --noEmit --noCheck && knip && node --import tsx --test config.test.ts template-files.test.ts hydrate.test.ts howabanda/monitor-state.test.ts howabanda/comms/*.test.ts
scripts.ai:check:strict: biome check --error-on-warnings . && tsgo --noEmit && knip && node --import tsx --test config.test.ts template-files.test.ts hydrate.test.ts howabanda/monitor-state.test.ts howabanda/comms/*.test.ts
